privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we safeguard your personal data in the AI era.

sections.title: Information Collection
sections.content: We collect professional data from your uploaded CVs, including contact details, work history, and skills, solely to enhance your job search experience through our neural optimization engine.

sections.title: AI Data Processing
sections.content: Your data is processed via OpenAI and Google Gemini APIs to generate keywords and optimize CVs. We enforce strict protocols to ensure your data is never used to train third-party AI models.

sections.title: Data Sovereignty
sections.content: Personal information is stored securely on Supabase (EU-based clusters). In strict compliance with GDPR, you retain the right to access, rectify, or request the permanent deletion of your data via the Emergency Purge tool.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Rules for using the CareerNexus Neural Engine.

sections.title: User Conduct
sections.content: Users must provide accurate professional information. Misuse of the platform or creating multiple fraudulent accounts to exploit AI limits is strictly prohibited and monitored.

sections.title: AI Liability
sections.content: While our neural engine provides high-fidelity optimization, CareerNexus does not guarantee job placement. The final accuracy and integrity of the generated output remain the user's sole responsibility.

sections.title: Fair Usage
sections.content: Application limits are strictly enforced based on your subscription tier (Discovery, Pro, or Elite). Deliberate technical exploits to bypass these limits will result in immediate account termination.

security.title: Data Security & GDPR
security.subtitle: Surgical-level security for your professional identity.

sections.title: End-to-End Encryption
sections.content: All data transfers are secured with SSL/TLS 1.3 encryption. Sensitive profile data is encrypted at rest using industry-grade AES-256 protocols to ensure multi-layered protection.

sections.title: Row-Level Security (RLS)
sections.content: Our database architecture uses Postgres RLS to ensure your data is isolated. No other entity, including unauthorized support staff, can view your private CV specimens.

sections.title: Zero-Retention Deletion
sections.content: Upon triggering the Emergency Sign Out & Purge, all associated data, including original PDFs and AI-generated models, are permanently erased within our 24-hour global sync cycle.

refund.title: Refund & Billing Policy
refund.subtitle: Clear, secure, and fully compliant billing guidelines tailored for our global and EU users.

sections.title: 14-Day Right of Withdrawal
sections.content: In accordance with EU consumer protection laws, you retain the right to request a full refund within 14 days of your purchase without providing any specific reason, subject to the Digital Content Exception below.

sections.title: The Digital Content Exception
sections.content: If you have already utilized our Neural Engine to synthesize a CV, generate a Cover Letter, or initiated a job application sync, the digital service is legally considered delivered in full. In these instances, the 14-day withdrawal right is instantly forfeited and no refunds can be issued.

sections.title: Partial Refunds & Account Integrity
sections.content: We do not offer prorated or partial refunds for unused time if you choose to cancel mid-cycle. Furthermore, accounts terminated due to Terms of Service violations, platform abuse, or fraudulent banking chargebacks are permanently barred and strictly ineligible for refunds.

sections.title: Refund Request & Processing
sections.content: To request an eligible refund, email support@digynex.se quoting your Order ID and reason. Once officially approved, your refund will be processed and credited exclusively back to your original payment method via Stripe within 5-10 business days.

sections.title: Secure Billing, Invoicing & Taxes
sections.content: All global payments are encrypted and handled seamlessly by Stripe; we never store your card data natively. Platform pricing incorporates applicable regional VAT/taxes with zero hidden fees. Upon completion, an official e-invoice identifying our Swedish corporate headquarters is dispatched to your registered email immediately.

sections.title: Renewals & Currency Transparency
sections.content: Annual structures (like the Founder's Pass) will automatically renew unless proactively canceled at least 24 hours prior to the next designated billing date. While billed broadly in USD, local bank statements and your final receipt may reflect SEK or EUR equivalencies dynamically. Should a payment pulse fail, system access is temporarily suppressed until resolved.
